subject: First Aid & Safety
title: Calling Poison Control
description: A quick win: understand Calling Poison Control.

hook.text: One phone number handles 2.4 million poisoning calls per year in the US: 1-800-222-1222.

buildup.text: Poison control centers are staffed by nurses, pharmacists, and toxicologists 24/7.

discovery.text: They can often manage cases over the phone, avoiding unnecessary and costly ER visits.

twist.text: 70% of cases are resolved at home with phone guidance—no hospital needed.

climax.text: Having the product container when you call helps experts identify ingredients instantly.

punchline.text: Don't Google it. Call poison control. They literally do this all day.

quiz.question: What percentage of poison control cases are resolved at home without a hospital visit?
